case_title: CHUNG SUM LI VS. BI HUA LIU

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, CHUNG SUM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, BI HUA $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $238.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, BI HUA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY LI, CHUNG SUM AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, BI HUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED, PERSON SERVED- NOT A PARTY TO THE CLAIM/SERVER.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. TRACY MOK INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. DEFENDANT PRESENT, WHO WAIVES INVALID SERVICE. RELAY INTERPRETING DONE ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER YONGMEI LIU PRESENT FOR DEFENDANT, HOWEVER HE DOES NOT SPEAK THE SAME DIALECT AS DEFENDANT. THE INTERPRETER INTERPRETS TO DEFENDANT'S SON HE ZHANG, WHO SPEAK BOTH DIALECTS, WHO THEN INTERPRETS FOR HIS FATHER. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIST RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LI, CHUNG SUM
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CHINESE (MANDARIN) TRANSLATOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, BI HUA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
